overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia exploring a rural landscape. The character dismounts from a horse, crosses a wooden bridge, walks through a ruined village with stone walls and thatched huts, then continues along a dirt path into open wilderness with snow-capped mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural approach to wooden bridge over stream

events.description: Geralt dismounts from his horse and begins walking forward
steps onto the wooden bridge crossing the stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt dismounts from his horse and walks steadily toward and across a rustic wooden bridge

entered.detail: rustic log bridge crossing a small stream with wooden railings
tall mountain range with snow-covered peaks dominating the background
weathered stone wall lining the left side of the path
crumbling stone wall on the right side of the approach
dilapidated cottage with straw roof visible beyond the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt on horseback in a grassy field with snow-capped mountains in the distance. He dismounts and walks toward a wooden bridge, crossing over a small stream. Stone walls and a thatched-roof hut become visible as he approaches the village entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined village with stone walls and abandoned structures

events.description: enters the confined ruined village area with stone walls on both sides
a black dog appears from the left and walks alongside briefly

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the ruins of a village, passing between weathered stone walls and abandoned huts

notable_agents.action: black dog walks alongside Geralt for a few seconds before stopping and remaining behind

entered.detail: abandoned wooden wagon with broken wheels sitting beside the path
collapsed stone structure with missing roof

segments.scene_description: Walking through the narrow confines of a ruined village, Geralt passes between ancient stone walls and abandoned thatched-roof huts. A black dog briefly accompanies him on the left. The path is lined with crumbling architecture and discarded wooden carts, with the snow-capped mountains now visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside path leaving the village

events.description: exits the confined village ruins into open grassland countryside
path curves slightly to the right as the terrain opens up

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along a dirt path leaving the village behind, entering open grassland with scattered fences

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence marking field boundaries in the distance
derelict wooden cart abandoned by the side of the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village ruins behind, the scene opens into wide grassland countryside. Geralt walks along a winding dirt path past wooden fences and an abandoned broken cart. The stone walls recede into the distance as the landscape becomes more open and natural.

events.description: sky becomes slightly darker as clouds thicken overhead
path winds slightly as it enters denser forest terrain

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through increasingly forested terrain with mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: thick coniferous trees closing in on the left side of the path
tall pine trees on the right side creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking through a wilderness trail flanked by dense pine forests on both sides. The path becomes more rugged and winding as it progresses through the valley. Stone walls reappear briefly on the left, while the snow-capped mountains dominate the center horizon ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from an open grassy field through a ruined village and into a rugged mountain wilderness. It begins with Geralt dismounting his horse in a field and crossing a wooden bridge over a small stream, where the first stone walls and thatched huts of a village emerge. As he enters the settlement, the view narrows between crumbling architecture and abandoned carts, accompanied briefly by a black dog while the snow-capped mountains shift to the right. The scene then opens back into wide grassland as he leaves the ruins behind, following a winding dirt path past wooden fences and a broken cart. Finally, the landscape transforms into a rugged wilderness trail flanked by dense pine forests, leading deeper into a valley with the towering mountains dominating the horizon.
